title: Why was Eva 03 sent to Japan
display_title: Why was Eva 03 sent to Japan
wikitext:
[]: Why was Eva-03 sent to Japan? [Spoilers] Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:35 pm Because it was requested, here: a "why was Eva-03 sent to Japan?" thread. Remember to play nice.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:12 pm I suppose the obvious answer is "Because that's where the angels attack." But I'm sure there's some sort of in series political reason.

[]: Post by TheWaffleCult » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:19 pm master_lloyd wrote: I suppose the obvious answer is "Because that's where the angels attack." But I'm sure there's some sort of in series political reason.

[]: Post by schismatics » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:54 pm Because that's where giant robots belong...in Japan. Good god can you imagine an Eva wandering about in the mid-west??

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:56 pm if NERV branch isn't allowed to do experimenting it's logical to send unit to NERV HQ which happen to be in Japan. There's no reason to send it to some really obscure location

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 26, 2009 7:17 pm schismatics wrote: Because that's where giant robots belong...in Japan. Good god can you imagine an Eva wandering about in the mid-west??

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Jul 26, 2009 7:21 pm hmm, wild wild west might work, give me a few days....

[]: Post by schismatics » Sun Jul 26, 2009 7:48 pm Axell wrote: hmm, wild wild west might work, give me a few days....

[]: Post by Chaos Pudding » Sun Jul 26, 2009 11:20 pm I was thinking that, somehow, SEELE knew that 03 had Bardiel in it, and wanted to further things along. Or maybe they actually did send Mari, and wanted Asuka out of the way so she could pilot 02? Meh, neither sounds very solid.

[]: Post by Eva 04 » Mon Jul 27, 2009 12:58 am I thought it was because of what happened with Unit 04 and the second Nerv branch that Unit 03 was sent over to Japan so it wouldnt happen again.Or is this just a joke and you guys are just messing around?

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Mon Jul 27, 2009 8:15 am Any moonspeakers out there know what the reason in Rebuild is? Is it still "Oh Shit the last one exploded, you can have it!" ?

[]: Post by Soul Fire » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:07 am Gendo just wanted to see Rei or Asuka in a skin tight see-thru plug suit exstravaganza?

[]: Post by NemZ » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:12 am Axell wrote: hmm, wild wild west might work, give me a few days....

[]: Post by Axell » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:12 am he sees Rei naked whenever he wants though. Gendo: Rei, its time again, take off your cloths and get int the tube, slowly.... Rei: Didn't we do this yesterday? Gendo: I said take off your cloths! Rei: Yes Sir Gendo: Ohhhh baby

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 27, 2009 9:14 am Axell wrote: Gendo: Ohhhh baby

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Jul 27, 2009 10:45 am I hope I don't give anyone a WTF, but based on the Vatican Treaty, couldnt they have sent 03 over because maybe there were too many Evas? Im pretty sure that Unit 05 was in America.........So The Americans have "Eva Creation abilities" maybe that's where Evas unit 07 and 08 are being developed and built?

[]: Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Jul 27, 2009 10:54 am wonderluster wrote: I hope I don't give anyone a WTF, but based on the Vatican Treaty, couldnt they have sent 03 over because maybe there were too many Evas? Im pretty sure that Unit 05 was in America.........So The Americans have "Eva Creation abilities" maybe that's where Evas unit 07 and 08 are being developed and built?

[]: Post by wonderluster » Mon Jul 27, 2009 11:03 am SaltyJoe wrote: wonderluster wrote: I hope I don't give anyone a WTF, but based on the Vatican Treaty, couldnt they have sent 03 over because maybe there were too many Evas? Im pretty sure that Unit 05 was in America.........So The Americans have "Eva Creation abilities" maybe that's where Evas unit 07 and 08 are being developed and built?

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Jul 27, 2009 11:24 am Because the americans were effing cowards after 04 blew the hell up, and they didnt want 03 to do the same on their turf. As we all know it was a bad idea.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Jul 27, 2009 11:45 am Eh, I'm just going to lock this until the relevant dialogue gets translated.
summary:
[]: Why was Eva-03 sent to Japan? [Spoilers] Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:35 pm Because it was requested, here: a "why was Eva-03 sent to Japan?" thread. Remember to play nice.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:12 pm I suppose the obvious answer is "Because that's where the angels attack." But I'm sure there's some sort of in series political reason.

[]: Post by TheWaffleCult » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:19 pm master_lloyd
